message:
feat: Add Requesty support to Claude Code wrapper

Enables --claude-code mode to work with Requesty provider for seamless
Claude Code SDK integration with 300+ models.

Changes:
- Added 'requesty' to ProxyConfig provider union type
- Added Requesty case to getProxyConfig() function
- Configured default model: deepseek/deepseek-chat
- Set API key from REQUESTY_API_KEY environment variable
- Enabled proxy requirement flag for proper routing

Usage:
  npx agentic-flow claude-code --provider requesty "your prompt"

This completes the Requesty integration across all CLI modes.

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
